svg.text: RBS certification tracking · Sale cutoff enforcement · TIPS certification · Dram shop liability logging
Enforced at POS register — register refuses alcohol ring-ups after jurisdiction cutoff
Register will refuse alcohol ring-ups after cutoff
Override: manager PIN required (logged to audit trail)
CA requires 7-year transaction retention (Business & Professions Code §25602)
All alcohol ring-ups, refusals, and ID verifications are logged to pos_audit_log. Deletion is blocked by system policy.
🎖 RBS / TIPS Certification — CA AB 1221 (required Sept 2022)
All servers, bartenders, and managers must hold valid RBS or TIPS certification to ring up alcohol sales in California.
📄 ID Verification Audit Log — Last 10 Age Verifications
Immutable 7-year retention for dram shop defense · Business & Professions Code §25602
🔴 Uncertified server blocked from alcohol ring-ups: Lisa K. — 3 attempts today
7-year log retention for dram shop defense · Logs cannot be deleted · Export via ABC Audit button above · pos_audit_log table
